title: Building with Anthropic's Fable 5 LIVE - Is It Really Worth the Hype?
summary: Cole Medin tests Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model against real-world tasks to assess whether its capabilities justify the 2x price premium over Claude Opus 4.8. The stream evaluates whether the claimed increases in model capability deliver practical value.
writeup: Cole Medin runs a live test of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 against real-world tasks to judge whether its capabilities justify a 2x price premium over Claude Opus 4.8. The stream centers on a practical question: whether the model's claimed capability gains translate into value worth the higher cost. Coverage touches model capability, inference optimization, and benchmarking, with the evaluation built around hands-on tasks rather than spec sheets alone.
